headline: BofA hikes 2026 chips forecast to $1.3 trillion, names Nvidia, Broadcom, Marvell, AMD as top drivers
summary: Bank of America added $300 billion to its revenue target in just four months, doubling down on Nvidia, Broadcom, and AMD as the AI boom accelerates.

raw.headline: BofA hikes 2026 chips forecast to $1.3 trillion, names Nvidia, Broadcom, Marvell, AMD as top drivers
raw.summary: Bank of America added $300 billion to its revenue target in just four months, doubling down on Nvidia, Broadcom, and AMD as the AI boom accelerates.

headline: Shares of companies within the broader tech sector are trading higher amid overall market gain and easing energy costs after a ceasefire consensus was reached between the U.S. and Iran. Also, President Trump's social media post over the proposed 15-point agenda further lifted overall sentiment in the sector.

headline: Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) Valuation Check As Short Term Momentum Cools
summary: Event context and recent stock performance Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) has seen mixed recent share performance, with a small move over the past week and declines over the past month and past 3 months. This has prompted some investors to reassess the current setup. See our latest analysis for Cadence Design Systems. At a share price of $279.48, Cadence’s short term momentum has cooled, with a 30 day share price return of 5.88% and a 90 day share price return of 12.81%. The 1 year total...
